nodes.label: Maquette HTML dispositions Segments/Chronologie
nodes.rationale: Exploration schematique de 4 dispositions de la bande de filtres de l'onglet 'Tableau de bord'. La zone verte = nouveaux filtres remplacant B4/B5/B6 ; la sidebar bleue = menu de navigation existant. Tous les graphiques se recalculent selon les filtres.

nodes.label: Maquette A - barre horizontale (recommandee)
nodes.rationale: Segments Vehicule + Carburant + Chronologie Periode en barre pleine largeur sous la banniere, lecture gauche->droite, chronologie a la place de respirer. Marquee 'Recommande' ; correspond a la Disposition A retenue dans le plan X39.

nodes.label: Maquette B - colonne de filtres a droite
nodes.rationale: Filtres groupes a droite facon volet, compact, mais chronologie etroite (verticale = peu lisible pour un axe temps).
nodes.norm_label: maquette b - colonne de filtres a droite

nodes.label: Maquette C - segments dans la banniere + chronologie pleine largeur
nodes.rationale: Segments compacts dans la banniere, chronologie en bande dediee ; gain de hauteur mais banniere plus chargee. Brievement essayee en code (dispo C 2-rangees) puis annulee au profit du retour 1-rangee.
nodes.norm_label: maquette c - segments dans la banniere + chronologie pleine largeur

nodes.label: Maquette D - zone filtres entre KPIs et graphiques
nodes.rationale: Les filtres separent visuellement l'en-tete (KPI) des graphiques qu'ils pilotent -> relation filtre->graphique tres lisible.
nodes.norm_label: maquette d - zone filtres entre kpis et graphiques

nodes.label: Tâche 2 — Groupe B boutons de champ (1-2)
nodes.norm_label: tache 2 — groupe b boutons de champ (1-2)

nodes.label: Tâche 4 — Vérification complète + docs + version + push
nodes.norm_label: tache 4 — verification complete + docs + version + push

nodes.label: Perimetre pragmatique : Vehicule -> gConso seul
nodes.rationale: Periode + Carburant filtrent TOUS les graphiques ; le filtre Vehicule n'affecte que gConso, car les autres graphiques viennent de Suivi Carburant/Tableau2 qui n'a PAS de colonne Vehicule. gVeh reste une comparaison tous-vehicules. Contrainte assumee.

nodes.label: modFiltres
nodes.rationale: Nouveau module (~390 l.) hote de toute la logique de filtres natifs : RebuildFilterSrc, EnsureFilterPivot, EnsureSlicers, ApplyFiltersFromControls, WritePeriodFromTimeline, PlaceSlicers, ApplyDefaultPeriodOnce, RefreshFilterData. Entree (re)build = SetupFilterControls.

nodes.label: modGraphiques
nodes.rationale: Moteur de construction des graphiques web (CreerGraphiquesWeb). Contient BuildAggregates, BuildConsoBlock, BuildPriceBlockMerged, InCsvSel, EnsurePeriodNames. Etend pour multi-carburant (gPrice), gConso multi-vehicule et filtre periode.

nodes.label: modDashboardGraphiques
nodes.rationale: Couche de mise en page du dashboard (MAJ_Dashboard_Graphiques, RecreerDashboardComplet, StyleParamsPanel, EnsureSelectors, AddButton, AddButtonLabels). Decale les KPI sous la bande de segments (SEG_BAND), masque le bloc A1:B10, appelle modFiltres.EnsureFilterUI.

nodes.label: ModuleImportGS
nodes.rationale: Importe les nouveaux pleins depuis _ImportGS (ImporterNouveauxPleins). Bug date corrige : ne plus CStr() une vraie date pour la re-parser ; lire CDate(cell.value) si IsDate.

nodes.label: Feuil3 (Tableau de bord)
nodes.rationale: Codename du module de document de la feuille 'Tableau de bord'. Worksheet_Activate -> MAJ_Dashboard_Graphiques (anti-rebond 15 s). A heberge un temps Worksheet_FollowHyperlink (filet de securite du survol), retire au revert de la Task 5.

nodes.label: ThisWorkbook
nodes.rationale: Module de document du classeur. Heberge l'evenement Workbook_SheetPivotTableUpdate qui relaie les changements de segments/chronologie vers ApplyFiltersFromControls.

nodes.label: ApplyDefaultPeriodOnce
nodes.rationale: Cale slcPeriode sur [1er ; dernier plein] a la 1ere activation seulement (drapeau g_PeriodDefaultDone), periode non bornee (B9/B10 vides). Enrobe la sequence de EnableEvents=False sinon RecreerDashboardComplet declenche Workbook_SheetPivotTableUpdate qui re-applique l'ancien filtre et annule le calage.

nodes.label: RefreshFilterData
nodes.rationale: Reecrit tFilterSrc EN PLACE (ClearContents + Resize, sans Unlist) a chaque ouverture pour que segments et chronologie refletent les imports recents SANS casser la chronologie creee par COM (recreation COM non rejouable en VBA).

nodes.label: SetFilterDateRange (TimelineState)
nodes.rationale: Cale la chronologie sur une plage. Fix no-op : une borne fractionnaire (date+heure, dernier plein a 02:00) est ignoree silencieusement -> arrondir au jour plein avec Int(dMin)/Int(dMax) avant l'appel.

nodes.label: Workbook_SheetPivotTableUpdate
nodes.rationale: Evenement pivot : si Target.Name='ptFiltres' -> ApplyFiltersFromControls. Se declenche aussi bien pour un segment que pour la chronologie (TCD partage), ce qui permet de capter tous les changements de filtre par un seul evenement.

nodes.label: ptFiltres (TCD cache)
nodes.rationale: TCD cache sur tFilterSrc, hote des Segments + Chronologie. Necessaire car les graphiques ne sont PAS des graphiques croises dynamiques : un segment/chronologie ne peut filtrer directement un graphique normal. Fragilite : SetupFilterControls recree ptFiltres -> casserait le lien de la chronologie creee par COM.

nodes.label: tFilterSrc / _FilterSrc
nodes.rationale: Table source des filtres (colonnes Date, Vehicule, Carburant=FuelKey(Type)), 13 l. reconstruites depuis GS_Pleins via RebuildFilterSrc. Carburant normalise (FuelKey) ; seed des carburants canoniques manquants (E85/SP95/SP98/E10/GAZOLE/GPLc) en reutilisant 1ere date+vehicule reels.

nodes.label: ApplyFiltersFromControls
nodes.rationale: Lit SlicerCsv(field) (items coches -> CSV ; tous/aucun -> '(tous)') -> ecrit B5/B6 ; WritePeriodFromTimeline -> B9/B10 ; puis RecreerDashboardComplet. Garde g_Applying (anti-reentrance). Chaque clic = RecreerDashboardComplet (~20-30 s, lourd, optimisable).

nodes.label: WritePeriodFromTimeline
nodes.rationale: Lit SlicerCaches('tlPeriode').TimelineState.StartDate/EndDate (lisible en VBA, pas en pywin32) -> ecrit B9/B10 (vide = non borne). Appelee depuis ApplyFiltersFromControls.

nodes.label: RecreerDashboardComplet
nodes.rationale: = CreerGraphiquesWeb(False) puis MAJ_Dashboard_Graphiques. Reproduit le rendu d'ouverture ; cible de btnRecreerGraph.OnAction. Ne touche PAS au filtre (prouve par grep + helper ReadTL) : le calage no-op venait de la borne horaire, pas du rebuild.

nodes.label: BuildConsoBlock (gConso multi-vehicule)
nodes.rationale: 1 courbe L/100km par vehicule depuis GS_Pleins (conso = Litres / Delta-km x 100, garde-fou 0<conso<60), tableau croise Date x Vehicule ecrit en col BC=55 pour eviter la collision prix G..M / vehicules O..Q. Le filtre periode filtre le POINT conso (pas le plein brut) pour ne pas fausser les Delta-km.

nodes.label: BuildPriceBlockMerged (gPrice multi-carburant)
nodes.rationale: gPrice respecte la multi-selection carburant (B6 CSV) : param selFuels (CSV), wantSet via FuelKey, 2 sources gardees (Source1 Tableau2/marche, Source2 PrixHistory). Retrait de la restriction InStr(selFuel, ',')=0 au site d'appel.

nodes.label: Filtre Periode (B9/B10, PERIODE_DEB/FIN)
nodes.rationale: Vars module mPerDeb/mPerFin (0=non borne) lues depuis B9/B10 ; EnsurePeriodNames cree les noms PERIODE_DEB->B9 / PERIODE_FIN->B10. Choix B9/B10 (et non _GraphData!BC1/BC2 du plan) car BC=col conso ET _GraphData subit Cells.Clear a chaque build (PERIODE y serait perdu). Filtre applique aux 3 builders dates ; gVeh non filtre (comparaison tous-vehicules sans dimension date, decision figee).

nodes.label: Decision Chronologie hybride (puis 100% COM)
nodes.rationale: Le plan figeait 'chronologie non scriptable (Add2 xlTimeline -> Err 5 en VBA) => handoff manuel 1x'. Decouverte session b : la chronologie EST creable par COM/pywin32 late-binding : SlicerCaches.Add2(ptFiltres,'Date','tlPeriode',2) cree le cache (type 2) PUIS cache.Slicers.Add(dash, Name:=.., Caption:=.., Top, Left, Width, Height) cree le controle visible. Args en mots-cles (positionnel -> E_INVALIDARG). Donc plus de handoff utilisateur.

nodes.label: Disposition A (barre filtres horizontale)
nodes.rationale: Disposition retenue : bande horizontale de filtres sous la banniere (3 controles alignes, largeur egale, couvrant la largeur du bandeau). KPI+meta+graphiques decales de SEG_BAND vers le bas. Bleu charte SlicerStyleLight5 / TimeSlicerStyleLight5 (le custom TableStyles.Add est rejete 'params invalides' -> built-in).

nodes.label: Task 5 Survol (etiquette boutons) - abandonne
nodes.rationale: Etiquette stylee au survol des 3 boutons verts : tentative hyperlien+ScreenTip = KO (sur shape-image l'hyperlien intercepte le clic SANS declencher Worksheet_FollowHyperlink -> bouton inerte ET pas d'etiquette). Repli ActiveX (Forms.Image + ControlTipText) abandonne (instable + LoadPicture ne lit pas les PNG). Solution finale : mini-titres (dash_btnlbl_0..2, 7 pt blanc) sous les boutons + retour PNG+OnAction.

nodes.label: Bug date 06/09 vs 09/06 (corrige)
nodes.rationale: ImporterNouveauxPleins faisait ParseGoogleDate(CStr(cell.value)) sur une cellule _ImportGS!Date deja vraie date -> CStr '09/06/2026' (FR) -> heuristique US (jour<=12 => mois) -> 6 sept. Fix : If IsDate(cell.value) Then CDate(cell.value). Ecriture pywin32 via serial Excel (anti-decalage TZ -2h).

nodes.label: APP_VERSION
nodes.description: Application version string (semver X.Y.Z.W), source of truth for versioning.

nodes.label: GAS_URL
nodes.description: Google Apps Script Web App endpoint URL for all backend operations.

nodes.label: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
nodes.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for Google Identity Services (Sign in with Google, U7).

nodes.label: GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY
nodes.description: Google Maps JavaScript API key; empty = fallback to homemade OSM rendering.

nodes.label: GOOGLE_MAPS_MAP_ID
nodes.description: Google Maps Map ID required for AdvancedMarkerElement (replaces deprecated Marker).

nodes.label: APP_TOKEN
nodes.description: Shared secret token (soft mode) sent to GAS for light rate-limiting (S6).

nodes.label: VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
nodes.description: VAPID public key for Web Push subscriptions (S8).

nodes.label: PRIX_API
nodes.description: French government fuel price API endpoint (data.economie.gouv.fr ODS v2.1).

nodes.label: BAN_API
nodes.description: Base Adresse Nationale API for geocoding addresses to lat/lon (free, no key).

nodes.label: FUEL_CONFIG
nodes.description: Map of fuel types (E85, SP98, SP95, E10, GAZOLE, GPLC) with API fields, labels, icons and placeholders.

nodes.label: FUEL_KEYS
nodes.description: Array of fuel type keys derived from FUEL_CONFIG.

nodes.label: FUEL_SELECT
nodes.description: ODS SELECT clause string for fuel price API queries.

nodes.label: FUEL_ANY
nodes.description: ODS WHERE clause fragment matching any non-null fuel price.

nodes.label: localStorage Keys
nodes.description: All localStorage key constants (VEHICULES_KEY, DRAFT_KEY, AUTH_TOKEN_KEY, STATS_CACHE_KEY, etc.) for persistent app state.

nodes.label: CO2 Constants
nodes.description: CO2 emission constants for E85 vs essence comparison (CO2_ESSENCE_PER_L, CO2_E85_RATIO, CO2_E85_PER_L, CO2_THERMIQUE_PER_KM, CO2_ARBRE_PAR_AN).

nodes.label: E85_RENTABLE_RATIO
nodes.description: Threshold ratio (0.66) for E85 profitability versus SP98.

nodes.label: DEFAULT_SURCONSO
nodes.description: Default overconsumption ratio for E85 vs petrol (+20%), used when no SP98 records exist.

nodes.label: main.js
nodes.description: Application entry point: wires all modules, registers event handlers, manages auth lifecycle and data loading.

nodes.label: initStaticHandlers
nodes.description: Registers all static DOM event listeners (theme, PWA, vehicle, form inputs, history, etc.).

nodes.label: selectStationFromMap
nodes.description: Global function orchestrating map pin click: highlights marker, shows popup with itinerary options.

nodes.label: carte.js
nodes.description: Map rendering module with dual engine: Google Maps (via gmaprender.js) or fallback OSM tile renderer.

nodes.label: showMap
nodes.description: Common entry point to display station map, choosing Google Maps or OSM based on API availability.

nodes.label: hideMap
nodes.description: Hides the station map wrapper element.

nodes.label: _renderMap
nodes.description: OSM fallback renderer: draws static tile grid with station pins using Web-Mercator projection.

nodes.label: tileXY
nodes.description: Converts lat/lon to Web-Mercator tile X/Y indices at zoom z (exported for unit tests).

nodes.label: showPinLabel
nodes.description: Shows a station pin label on hover/click with auto-hide after 2 seconds.

nodes.label: initMapInteractions
nodes.description: T2 — Sets up delegated event listeners on #stationMap for click/hover/touchstart on map pins.

nodes.label: formulaire.js
nodes.description: Form module: fuel fill submission, draft auto-save, duplicate detection, km validation, voice input.

nodes.label: saveDraft
nodes.description: W15 — Saves current form state to localStorage (DRAFT_KEY) if any field is filled.

nodes.label: restoreDraft
nodes.description: W15 — Restores form from localStorage draft, triggers km validation and duplicate check.

nodes.label: clearDraft
nodes.description: Removes draft from localStorage after successful submit or form reset.

nodes.label: checkDuplicate
nodes.description: Shows a warning if date+km+litres match an existing record (duplicate detection).

nodes.label: onKmInput
nodes.description: Live km validation: warns if entered km is less than or equal to the last fill for the vehicle.

nodes.label: onStationChange
nodes.description: Handles station select change: cancels OSM enrichment, fetches prices at chosen station coords.

nodes.label: submitForm
nodes.description: Submits a fuel fill to GAS_URL via POST; handles offline queuing, duplicate confirmation, auth check.

nodes.label: _parseSpeechToNumber
nodes.description: W35 — Converts a spoken string (French) to an integer km value for voice input.

nodes.label: initVoiceKm
nodes.description: W35 — Initializes the voice dictation button for km field using SpeechRecognition API.

nodes.label: resetForm
nodes.description: Resets all form fields, clears draft, clears ticket photo, resets price state.

nodes.label: gmaprender.js
nodes.description: Reusable Google Maps renderer for station maps; used by carte.js and stationsmap.js (W63).

nodes.label: googleMapsActive
nodes.description: Returns true if Google Maps API key is configured and auth has not failed.

nodes.label: renderGoogleStationMap
nodes.description: Renders an interactive Google Maps with station markers and user position; falls back to OSM on failure.

nodes.label: prix.js
nodes.description: Fuel price fetching module using the French government ODS API with in-memory cache (5 min TTL).

nodes.label: fetchPricesAtCoords
nodes.description: Fetches fuel prices near a lat/lon using expanding circles (500m→2km→5km) with cache.

nodes.label: fetchPricesNearUser
nodes.description: Fetches fuel prices near the user's GPS position, or shows CP search if GPS unavailable.

nodes.label: fetchPricesByCP
nodes.description: Fetches fuel prices by manually entered French postal code.

nodes.label: fetchStationPricesSilent
nodes.description: Silently fetches all 6 fuel prices at a station (no UI side-effects) for form submission completeness.

nodes.label: fetchNearestE85Price
nodes.description: Fetches the nearest E85 price (fallback for non-E85 fills to complete station price columns).

nodes.label: evalRentabiliteE85
nodes.description: Evaluates E85 vs SP98 profitability and updates the rentaBadge UI element.

nodes.label: applyPricesResult
nodes.description: Parses ODS API result, updates state._stationPrices, type toggle, badges, form price field, and checks price alerts.

nodes.label: ODS Cache
nodes.description: In-memory Map cache for ODS fuel price API responses keyed by (lat, lon, radius) with 5-minute TTL.

nodes.label: recherche.js
nodes.description: Station search by address/city/postal code using BAN geocoding and ODS price API.

nodes.label: onAutreInput
nodes.description: Debounced handler for manual station search input (min 3 chars, 500ms delay).

nodes.label: setRadius
nodes.description: Sets search radius in meters and re-triggers station search if query is present.

nodes.label: geocodeAddress
nodes.description: Geocodes an address/city/postal code to lat/lon via BAN API.

nodes.label: buildStations
nodes.description: Builds displayable station objects from ODS results with distance and price data.

nodes.label: searchStationSuggestions
nodes.description: Main search function: geocodes query, fetches stations in radius, enriches with OSM names, renders map.

nodes.label: buildSearchClause
nodes.description: Builds ODS WHERE clause for postal code or city-name search.

nodes.label: stationsmap.js
nodes.description: Usual stations map card: static map + average prices list, geocoding, pinned stations, sort (W36/W47/W53).

nodes.label: renderStationsCard
nodes.description: Renders the #stationsMapCard with fuel selector, sector prices, sorted station list, and map.

nodes.label: computeStationAverages
nodes.description: Computes average price per usual station for a given fuel key from history records.

nodes.label: cacheStationCoords
nodes.description: Persists station lat/lon to localStorage cache (COORD_CACHE_KEY) with source tag (pick|geo).

nodes.label: getStationCoords
nodes.description: Retrieves cached station coordinates from localStorage, used for price fetching at the right location.

nodes.label: initStationsMapInteractions
nodes.description: S11 — Delegated click handler on #stationsMapCard for pin/sort/fuel/marker interactions.

nodes.label: COORD_CACHE_KEY
nodes.description: localStorage key for station coordinate cache (suivi_e85_station_coords).

nodes.label: stats.js
nodes.description: Live statistics: consumption KPIs, E85 vs SP98 savings, CO2 avoided, sparkline, next fill prediction.

nodes.label: getKitPrix
nodes.description: Returns the conversion kit price from localStorage (KIT_PRIX_KEY), default DEFAULT_KIT_PRIX.

nodes.label: getBudgetMensuel
nodes.description: W39 — Returns the monthly fuel budget objective from localStorage (BUDGET_KEY).

nodes.label: getObjectifCo2
nodes.description: W51 — Returns the annual CO2 avoidance objective from localStorage (CO2_OBJECTIF_KEY).

nodes.label: computeSurconso
nodes.description: Dynamically computes E85 overconsumption ratio from records (avg E85 conso / avg SP98 conso - 1).

nodes.label: vehicules.js
nodes.description: Vehicle management: localStorage persistence, select population, global vehicle state (U9).

nodes.label: getVehicules
nodes.description: Returns vehicles list from localStorage (VEHICULES_KEY).

nodes.label: setCurrentVehicule
nodes.description: U9 — Single source of truth for current vehicle: updates state, persists, syncs selects, dispatches 'vehicule-changed'.

nodes.label: chargerVehicules
nodes.description: Loads vehicles from localStorage and populates vehicle selectors on startup.

nodes.label: wrapped.js
nodes.description: W37 — Annual recap 'Wrapped': total litres, cost, km, E85 savings, favourite station, most expensive month.

nodes.label: getScope
nodes.description: Returns current Wrapped scope ('vehicule' | 'all') from localStorage (WRAPPED_SCOPE_KEY).

nodes.label: package.json
nodes.description: NPM project manifest: version 5.16.0.0, scripts (dev/build/test/lint/gas:deploy), devDeps (Vite, Vitest, Playwright, ESLint, Husky), dep tesseract.js, Node >=24.

nodes.label: npm run dev
nodes.description: Launches Vite local dev server.

nodes.label: npm run build
nodes.description: Vite production build to dist/ with base /suivi-conso-carburant/.

nodes.label: npm test (vitest)
nodes.description: Runs Vitest unit tests once.

nodes.label: npm run test:e2e (playwright)
nodes.description: Runs Playwright E2E tests in headless Chromium.

nodes.label: npm run lint
nodes.description: ESLint on js/ with --max-warnings=0 (strict).

nodes.label: npm run gas:deploy
nodes.description: Runs gas-deploy.mjs to deploy Google Apps Script.

nodes.label: rebuild_vba.py
nodes.description: Python script (win32com/COM) that rebuilds the VBA project: renames modules, removes snippet modules, creates General, restores document modules from .bas files.

nodes.label: strip_attribute_header()
nodes.description: Removes Attribute VB_* header lines from VBA source before deployment.

nodes.label: scripts/check_vba_drift.py
nodes.description: Compares VBA modules in the .xlsm (via oletools) with vba/*.bas files on disk; exits 0=no drift, 1=drift, 2=error.

nodes.label: extract_from_xlsm()
nodes.description: Extracts VBA module sources from .xlsm using oletools.olevba.VBA_Parser.

nodes.label: load_bas_files()
nodes.description: Loads vba/*.bas files from disk, skipping _snippet/_tmp/synchronisegoogleform suffixes.

nodes.label: normalize()
nodes.description: Strips Attribute VB_* lines and normalizes line endings for comparison.

nodes.label: scripts/sync-gas.sh
nodes.description: Bash script: deploys GAS via gas-deploy.mjs then commits .gs/.html/.md files; supports --no-deploy and --diff flags.

nodes.label: tests/carte.test.js
nodes.description: Vitest/jsdom tests for js/carte.js: tileXY Web-Mercator math, _renderMap OSM fallback, showMap/hideMap, showPinLabel; gmaprender mocked.

nodes.label: tileXY tests
nodes.description: Tests lat/lon → tile index conversion at zoom 1 and 2.

nodes.label: _renderMap tests
nodes.description: Tests OSM fallback map rendering: tiles, pins (name-escaped), attribution, and radius circle.

nodes.label: showMap/hideMap tests
nodes.description: Tests station coordinate filtering, container visibility toggling, and error-free empty case.

nodes.label: tests/formulaire.test.js
nodes.description: Vitest/jsdom tests for js/formulaire.js: draft save/restore/clear, duplicate detection, km validation, speech-to-number parsing, form submission (auth, offline, station prices reload).

nodes.label: Draft save/restore tests
nodes.description: Tests saveDraft/restoreDraft/clearDraft against localStorage DRAFT_KEY.

nodes.label: _parseSpeechToNumber tests
nodes.description: Tests French voice dictation km parsing: digit strings, French words, invalid input.

nodes.label: tests/wrapped.test.js
nodes.description: Vitest/jsdom tests for js/wrapped.js (W57): buildWrapped aggregation, shareWrapped with Web Share API, PNG download fallback, and AbortError no-op.

nodes.label: buildWrapped tests
nodes.description: Sanity check: aggregates 2 E85 records for 2025 (nbPleins=2, totalLitres=78).

nodes.label: shareWrapped tests
nodes.description: Tests Web Share API file share, PNG download fallback, and AbortError non-action.

nodes.label: .claude/skills/vba-agent/README.md
nodes.description: README for the vba-agent Claude Code skill: COM/pywin32 VBA editor, installation, and quick-start commands (list, inspect, backup, set-module, build-form, save).

nodes.label: vba_agent set-module command
nodes.description: Deploys a VBA standard module from a .bas file into an open Excel workbook via COM.

nodes.label: vba_agent backup command
nodes.description: Exports all VBA components of an open workbook to a backup directory.

nodes.label: Plan sidebar icônes+titre (2026-06-13)
nodes.description: Implementation plan (9 tasks, checkbox steps) for Excel sidebar refonte: icon column + title peek, snapshot/restore geometry, modNavMenu removal, COM verification.

nodes.label: Spec sidebar icônes+titre (2026-06-13)
nodes.description: Design spec v5.15.0.0: context, bug root cause (zoom recalculation), requirements, behavior choices, technical design (modSidebar procedures), constraints, acceptance criteria.

nodes.label: Bug: CollapseIcon zoom recalculation
nodes.description: Root cause: CollapseIcon used live zoom instead of creation zoom for ico.Width, causing pixel mismatch. Fix: snapshot/restore exact geometry.

nodes.label: Sidebar states machine
nodes.description: Three states: Replié (sb_ham only) → Colonne d'icônes (ham click) → Aperçu titre (icon click, transient).

nodes.label: Lesson: VB_Name attribute causes macro failure
nodes.description: Never include Attribute VB_Name lines in code sent via set-module; strip them before deployment.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: vb_name attribute causes macro failure

nodes.label: Lesson: deploy .bas as UTF-8 not CP1252
nodes.description: Never convert .bas UTF-8 to CP1252 temp file; deploy directly from UTF-8, only stripping VB_Name line to avoid garbled text (Ã‰ instead of É).
nodes.norm_label: lesson: deploy .bas as utf-8 not cp1252

nodes.label: Lesson: VBE code buffer cache after set-module
nodes.description: An open VBE code pane may cache stale code after set-module; fix by save + close/reopen workbook via COM.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: vbe code buffer cache after set-module

nodes.label: Lesson: shapes must use xlFreeFloating
nodes.description: Shapes positioned with absolute coords must have Placement=xlFreeFloating; otherwise they drift when columns are resized (xlMoveAndSize default).

nodes.label: Lesson: Private Const must be before first Sub
nodes.description: Private Const/Dim/Type at module level must appear before the first Sub/Function declaration, otherwise compile-on-demand raises Variable not defined.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: private const must be before first sub

nodes.label: Lesson: Call to deleted module = compile error
nodes.description: After removing a module, grep all Call/OnAction/OnTime/Run referencing its procedures; orphan calls cause compilation errors not catchable by On Error Resume Next.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: call to deleted module = compile error

nodes.label: Lesson: distinguish compile vs runtime COM errors
nodes.description: -2146788248 with empty description = compile error; with filled description = runtime error. Never classify a reproducible COM error as artefact without isolating.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: distinguish compile vs runtime com errors

nodes.label: Lesson: never CStr() a real date for re-parsing
nodes.description: CStr() on a date is locale-dependent (FR: jj/mm). Use CDate(cell.value) on a real date serial to avoid M/J US misinterpretation.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: never cstr() a real date for re-parsing

nodes.label: Lesson: timeline SetFilterDateRange ignores fractional dates
nodes.description: TimelineState.SetFilterDateRange silently ignores a bound with a time component; round bounds to Int() full days. Also disable events to prevent rebuild from reverting the filter.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: timeline setfilterdaterange ignores fractional dates

nodes.label: Lesson: no shell redirect chars in commit messages
nodes.description: Never use >, <, |, & in commit messages or descriptions; > creates empty files (e.g. 'design->code' created file 'code'). Use 'vers' instead.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: no shell redirect chars in commit messages

nodes.label: Lesson: always override background in dark theme active states
nodes.description: When adding dark-theme color: override on an active/selected state, always also override background; verify WCAG contrast for both themes (target ≥ 4.5:1).
nodes.norm_label: lesson: always override background in dark theme active states

nodes.label: Lesson: check file existence before creating
nodes.description: Always verify a file exists (Read or Glob) before creating it; 'create if not exists' only applies when the file is absent.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: check file existence before creating

nodes.label: Lesson: use (Get-Content $f).Count for line counting in PowerShell
nodes.description: Get-Content | Measure-Object -Line counts newlines within already-split elements (often 0); use (Get-Content $f).Count instead.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: use (get-content $f).count for line counting in powershell

nodes.label: Lesson: hyperlink ScreenTip tooltip fails on shape-image buttons
nodes.description: Hyperlink+ScreenTip technique intercepts click and FollowHyperlink does not trigger for shapes; only ActiveX (ControlTipText) provides hover tooltip, but is unstable with PNG.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: hyperlink screentip tooltip fails on shape-image buttons

nodes.label: Lesson: TimelineState properties fail in Python COM, work in VBA
nodes.description: TimelineState.StartDate/EndDate raises exception in pywin32 late-binding but works in VBA; test VBA equivalent before concluding API is broken.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: timelinestate properties fail in python com, work in vba

nodes.label: Lesson: verify VB_Name before import to avoid duplicates
nodes.description: Always check VB_Name in .bas before import; use set-module rather than import to prevent module duplication.
nodes.norm_label: lesson: verify vb_name before import to avoid duplicates

nodes.label: Bannière dashboard largeur dynamique (WTOT)
nodes.rationale: WTOT() lit le nombre de colonnes configuré pour 'Tableau de bord' dans la table Zoom de Réglages (via Affichage.ZoomColsForSheet) au lieu d'une constante 1160 pts ; bannière/KPI/grille s'adaptent au zoom de chaque onglet

nodes.label: ZoomColsForSheet rendu Public
nodes.rationale: Affichage.ZoomColsForSheet passe de Private à Public pour être appelée depuis modDashboardGraphiques

nodes.label: btnPleinEcran déplacé sur onglet Réglages
nodes.rationale: Le bouton Quitter le plein écran n'est plus posé sur tous les onglets (masqué par la navbar) ; affiché uniquement sur Réglages sous btnReg2, avec .Placement=xlFreeFloating

nodes.label: Barre de progression à l'ouverture (Workbook_Open v2.8)
nodes.rationale: Workbook_Open affiche 6 étapes via Application.StatusBar+DoEvents ; opérations lourdes différées (import +2s, synchro GS +5s) pour rendre le classeur interactif immédiatement
nodes.norm_label: barre de progression a l'ouverture (workbook_open v2.8)

nodes.label: Libellés boutons de navigation (NavbarBottom/AddButtonLabels)
nodes.rationale: NavbarBottom()+AddButtonLabels() posent les étiquettes texte sous les icônes de la barre de navigation ; placement raffiné dans PoserSidebarSurFeuille

nodes.label: Fix erreur compilation -2146788248 sélecteur véhicule (ByRef Single/Double)
nodes.rationale: hdrTop/btnTop (NavbarBottom() As Single) passés ByRef à des paramètres As Double dans EnsureHeaderBand -> Type argument ByRef incompatible (compile-on-demand). Types alignés en Double (leçon #33)
nodes.norm_label: fix erreur compilation -2146788248 selecteur vehicule (byref single/double)

nodes.label: modSidebar (barre de navigation Excel)
nodes.rationale: Navigation = barre horizontale fixe en haut de chaque feuille ; 6 items cliquables icône+label ; onglet actif vert+gras

nodes.label: Leçon #33: ByRef exige correspondance de type exacte
nodes.rationale: Une variable As Single passée ByRef à un paramètre As Double lève 'Type argument ByRef incompatible' à la compilation (compile-on-demand). Fix: aligner le type ou forcer ByVal via parenthèses
nodes.norm_label: lecon #33: byref exige correspondance de type exacte
